name: Eigen Technologies

seo.meta_description: Eigen Technologies: Document AI for legal/financial contracts with REST API and no-code training.

when_to_use: Extracting structured data from complex financial contracts via AI
Automating document review workflows in legal and finance
Building due diligence pipelines with AI document understanding
Reducing manual contract analysis time in M&A processes

pros: Tuned for legal and financial contracts
review.verdict: Defensible in legal and finance; general teams should try LLM extraction first.

review.not_for: General document AI where LLM-based extraction suffices

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
